segments.text: [phone ringing] Thanks for calling Allstate, where you're in good hands.
Para Español, oprima el ocho.
This call will be monitored and recorded. First off, will you need help with claims? Just say yes or no.
Yes.
I can help with that. I didn't recognize number. Last time. If you're the policyholder, just press one. If not, press two. In few words, tell me how I can help you today.
Existing claim.

Want to skip the wait? Check status and get assistance at allstate.com or the Allstate app. There you can review inspection info, documents, and payments. Would you like me to text you a link to that webpage? Please say yes or no.
No.
All right. Please say or enter the claim number or say, "I don't have it." Okay. Tell me the primary phone number on your account. Area code first, please, or say, "I don't know it."
Four eight zero eight zero.
Thanks. Give me just a moment to look that up. Let me make sure I got that right. I thought you gave me four eight zero two. Did I get that right?
Yes.
All right. Then please say or enter the nine or ten-digit policy number for the right policy, or say, "I don't have it."
Eight three eight two z-
Thanks. Give me just a moment to look that up. Let me make sure I got that right. I thought you gave me eight three eight two. Did I get that right?
Yes.

Hmm. I wasn't able to find that policy number. Let me just get a few details so I can get you to someone who can help. Just tell me, are you calling about an auto claim, a homeowner's claim, a life insurance claim, or something else?
Homeowner.
Before I transfer you, let's protect your account. To verify it's you, I'll need to send you a six-digit pin. Can I text it to the phone ending in one two nine seven?
No.

FYI, if that's an old number, have a rep update it to make your next call faster. Let's move on. All right. That's all I need. I'll get you right over to someone who can help you with that claim. [phone ringing]
[on-hold music] Hello, this is Jesus with You're In Good Hands. Just so you know, this call may be recorded for quality assurance. Whom do I have the pleasure of speaking with today?
This is Tanya from National-- Existing homeowner claim.
How you doing, Tanya? What is that claim number?
I'm doing well. Thank you. The claim number is seven two seven-
Tanya, is, is this a claim number or a policy number? A claim number should start with a zero.
That's the claim number.
What is the claim number? Repeat it, tell me one more time.
The claim number is seven two seven-
Bear with me. Let me go ahead and pull this up.
Thank you.
You're welcome. Whose name is on the, uh, policy?
The insured's name is Anthony.
And for security purposes, could you verify me the complete address and the type of loss, please?
The address is one two zero four eight East-- eight five five nine. The date of loss is September fifth.
Type of loss. Sorry about that.
The type of loss is a homeowner claim.
Correct. But what caused the damages?
I don't have that information available. Could I please leave a voicemail for the adjuster to discuss further?
What, what company you work for?
I work for National.
What, what, what, uh, message you wanna let the adjuster know regarding this?
Yes. Please let the adjuster know that I am following up on claim number seven two-- for Anthony. If they could return my call at four eight zero two six, I would appreciate it. Thank you.
No problem. And this is regarding payment or regarding-- what is it regarding?
I'm calling to check the status and any updates on the homeowner claim. If the adjuster is unavailable, could I please leave a voicemail?
Okay. I'll go ahead, uh, transfer you over to, uh, adjuster. And if he does not answer, you can leave a voicemail.
Thank you very much.
Okay. Bear with me.
I appreciate your help.

No problem. [phone ringing] Thank you for calling Allstate. We're in good hands. You've reached the voicemail of Jennifer, Property Claims department. I apologize for missing your call. If you could please leave your name, claim number, and phone number, I'll return your call as soon as I am able. Thank you for calling Allstate, and have a good day.

Hope you are doing well. Hi. This is Tanya calling from National regarding claim number seven two two seven for policyholder Anthony. We show an unpaid balance of eighty-nine thousand two hundred sixty-three dollars and sixty cents. Please confirm the current status and what's needed to release payment. I'm accountable for getting you answers. Email me at tanya@nationalfirst.com or call four eight zero-
